gui.connection module

gui/connection.py Manages live connection from HF Space to the laptop server via Cloudflare tunnel.

st.session_state[“conn”]:

url : permanent Cloudflare tunnel URL token : shared access token verified : bool - reached /api/online successfully harness : bool - measurement harness loaded on laptop mode : “offline” | “online” error : last error message

gui.connection.api_get(path: str, timeout: int = 10)[source]

GET from live server. Returns (data, error).

gui.connection.api_post(path: str, payload: dict, timeout: int = 30)[source]

POST to live server. Returns (data, error).

gui.connection.disconnect()[source]
gui.connection.get_conn() → dict[source]
gui.connection.get_token() → str[source]
gui.connection.is_online() → bool[source]
gui.connection.verify_connection(url: str, token: str) → tuple[source]

Returns (success: bool, message: str, harness: bool)
